questions.question: What is the time complexity for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem using dynamic programming?
questions.hint: The time complexity is O(nW) where n is the number of items and W is the capacity of the knapsack.

questions.question: What is the difference in space complexity between a bottom-up and top-down dynamic programming approach for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem?
questions.hint: For the bottom-up approach, the space complexity is O(nW), whereas for the top-down approach, it is O(W).

questions.question: How does the use of memoization affect the performance of a dynamic programming algorithm for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem?
questions.hint: Memoization can significantly improve the performance of a dynamic programming algorithm by avoiding redundant calculations.
